artifacts.summary: Root cause analysis: toggle_custom_color only toggles between custom colors and native PDF rendering (white). dark_mode_background_color only affects app chrome. Found 7 invalid config options. Recommend: use Nord as custom colors, native PDF as day mode.

key_findings: toggle_custom_color only works with custom_background_color, not dark_mode_background_color
dark_mode_background_color only affects app chrome, not PDF content
7 invalid config options are being silently rejected
setconfig commands were deprecated - no runtime theme switching
Solution: invert logic - use Nord as custom colors, native PDF as day mode
